# 07-Update a file in a repository [PUT]

`PUT /api/v4/projects/{id}/repository/files/{file_path}`

Updates a specified file in a repository. Use the Commits API to update multiple files with a single request.

### Parameters

| Name | Type | In | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | `string` | `path` | Yes | The project ID |
| `file_path` | `string` | `path` | Yes | The URL-encoded path to the file. |

### Request Body (multipart/form-data)

```json
{
  "file": string (required), // The file content to be updated (generated by Multipart middleware)
}
```
### Responses

#### 200 - OK

#### 400 - Bad Request

#### 404 - Not Found
